category_sources: source_facts.description says terrahash creates and stores hashes of Terraform modules; official README describes it as a command-line tool for Terraform module hashes.
display_name_sources: Official README uses TerraHash in the project description and terrahash as the command name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes usage commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ned1313/terrahash, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe hashing Terraform modules and CI-oriented command-line use.
